context: Tests whether the ADAttributionKit skill keeps SKAdNetwork migration and interoperability guidance precise instead of claiming a total replacement. The scorer should evaluate only the generated migration review file.

checklist.name: Coexistence
checklist.description: States that AdAttributionKit and SKAdNetwork can coexist during migration.

checklist.name: Joint ranking
checklist.description: States that impressions from both frameworks are evaluated together when determining an attribution winner.

checklist.name: Single winner
checklist.description: States that only one impression wins for a conversion.

checklist.name: Click precedence
checklist.description: Mentions click-through ads take precedence over view-through ads, with recency used within each group.

checklist.name: Framework APIs
checklist.description: Recommends AdAttributionKit update APIs for AdAttributionKit integrations and SKAdNetwork update APIs for SKAdNetwork integrations.

checklist.name: Dual updates
checklist.description: Recommends calling both sets of update APIs when the app is integrated with both frameworks.

checklist.name: No universal bridge
checklist.description: Does not claim that SKAdNetwork universally bridges all conversion values or that one update API is always sufficient.

checklist.name: No pending postbacks
checklist.description: States that update calls are ignored when there are no pending postbacks for the relevant framework.

checklist.name: ID compatibility
checklist.description: Mentions .adattributionkit and .skadnetwork ad network IDs are compatible across both frameworks.

checklist.name: Publisher plist
checklist.description: Does not say publisher apps should keep only .skadnetwork IDs; explains that publisher Info.plist declarations must cover the intended AdAttributionKit setup.
